name: Withanolides
mechanism_summary: Steroidal lactones associated with adaptogenic and cortisol-modulating activity.

name: Curcuminoids
mechanism_summary: Polyphenols associated with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Gingerols
mechanism_summary: Pungent phenolic compounds associated with anti-nausea and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Apigenin
mechanism_summary: Flavonoid associated with mild sedative and GABA-modulating activity.

name: Valerenic acid
mechanism_summary: Sesquiterpene associated with GABA-modulating, sleep-supportive activity.

name: Menthol
mechanism_summary: Cyclic monoterpenoid associated with smooth-muscle relaxation in the digestive tract.

name: Silymarin
mechanism_summary: Flavonolignan complex associated with hepatoprotective and antioxidant activity.

name: Anthocyanins
mechanism_summary: Pigmented flavonoids associated with antioxidant and immune-supportive activity.

name: Alkylamides
mechanism_summary: Lipophilic compounds associated with short-term immune modulation.

name: Flavone glycosides
mechanism_summary: Flavonoid glycosides associated with antioxidant and microcirculatory support.

name: Eugenol
mechanism_summary: Phenylpropanoid associated with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activity.

name: Glycyrrhizin
mechanism_summary: Triterpenoid saponin associated with anti-inflammatory, mucosa-soothing activity.

name: Chlorogenic acid
mechanism_summary: Polyphenol associated with antioxidant and metabolic support activity.

name: Taraxasterol
mechanism_summary: Triterpene associated with mild diuretic and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Oligomeric proanthocyanidins
mechanism_summary: Condensed tannins associated with cardiovascular antioxidant support.

name: Macamides
mechanism_summary: Fatty acid amides unique to maca, associated with energy and hormonal balance support.

name: Rosavins
mechanism_summary: Phenylpropanoid glycosides associated with adaptogenic, stress-modulating activity.

name: Harman alkaloids
mechanism_summary: Indole alkaloids associated with mild sedative, anxiolytic activity.
